# Aurora UI

> Copy-paste animated React components for Next.js (Tailwind, Radix, Framer Motion, WebGL).

Aurora UI is a source-first component library. Components are copied into your project — there is no opaque npm UI package.

## Live site

**https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/components** — previews, customization, source tabs

## Primary resources for AI agents

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| Agent guide | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/docs/FOR_AI.md |
| Agent manifest | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/.well-known/agents.json |
| OpenAI plugin | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/.well-known/ai-plugin.json |
| Registry (JSON) | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/api/registry |
| OpenAPI spec | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/openapi.json |
| LLM index | https://aurora-ui-tau.vercel.app/llms.txt |

## CLI

```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli list
npx aurora-ui-cli info webgl-globe
npx aurora-ui-cli add button card shimmer-button
```

## MCP (Cursor / Claude Desktop)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "aurora-ui": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "aurora-ui-mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

Tools: `list_components`, `search_components`, `get_component`, `get_component_source`, `get_integration_guide`

## Categories

Actions · Forms & Feedback · Cards & Surfaces · Overlays & Menus · Layout & Navigation · Typography & Counters · Backgrounds & Ambient Effects · 3D & WebGL

## Repository

https://github.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui
